$comment: Read by the companion plugin's nothing_loose PreToolUse hook via $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR (FAILS OPEN if absent/unreadable). allow_write = globs where the agent may Write/Edit; anything else (e.g. a NEW loose file at the repo root) is denied — the 'nothing loose' guard (constitution rule 8). Secret files (.env, *.pem, *.key, id_*) are blocked separately by env_protect. This is the FACTORY's own allowlist (the child ships its own under template/). Add a path here if the factory grows a new top-level location.
